data.current_role_summary: Go-To-Market specialist focused on the deployment of multi-agent AI systems for the procurement sector.
role_summary_bullets: Core Identity & Mission: Dedicated to building and scaling early-stage AI-driven business models within the technology and venture ecosystem.
Domain Mastery: Deep expertise in go-to-market (GTM) strategy, sales automation, and lead generation across B2B and automotive industries.
Quantifiable Impact: Designed and executed automation-driven GTM workflows for retail-facing safety and alarm solution providers.
Strategic Scope: Proven experience supporting sales strategy for international markets including Austria, Germany, and Switzerland.
Leadership Philosophy: Blends academic rigor in management and economics with practical, entrepreneur-led venture building experience.
Current Momentum: Currently driving GTM operations for YC23-backed AI startup Lio in the procurement technology space.
